welcome.title: Welcome to Benny
welcome.caption: Benny, the property inspection tool to quickly and efficiently register the condition of a rented property.

register.title: Sign up to Benny
register.caption: Welcome to Benny, the property inspection tool to quickly and efficiently register the condition of a rented property. Sign up now and easily create your first digital property inspection.
register.password_special: Contain at least one special character (#,&,$,@,...)
register.password_capital: Contain at least one capital letter
register.updates_caption: I would like to receive updates about Benny
register.button: Register and create a property inspection
register.terms_prefix: By clicking "Register" you agree to our
register.email_confirmation: We sent a confirmation email to {user_email}. Click the link inside to verify your signup & to get started with Benny.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.caption: No problem just enter the email you used when signing up for Benny and we will send you a password reset link!
forgot.message: We sent an email to {user_email} to reset your Benny password. Please also check the SPAM folder of your email client. Email delivery could take up to 30 minutes.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.caption: Choose a new password for your Benny account.
reset.success_message: You can now use your new password to log into Benny.

onboarding.address_min_input: Please fill the street and number
onboarding.use_plan: How you are planning to use Benny
onboarding.billing_title: Benny is free until you are ready
onboarding.billing_caption: This means that you can use all Benny features free of charge until you finalize one of your inspections. You can however already add your card details to ensure a smooth experience. You will not get billed until you finish an inspection.
